messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The front desk ingests any chat the bot can see — it filters on the sender, never on the chat
What it solves: THE DEFECT (verified in code, not assumed). `decideUpdateAction`
(`extension/src/tools/telegramFrontDeskBotCore.ts:181`) is the live inbound decision function.
It filters on the SENDER only — `isFromPrincipal(update, principalUserId)` compares
`message.from.id` against `TELEGRAM_PRINCIPAL_USER_ID` …
How it works: The front desk takes work only from its own chat

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-379 - The front desk ingests any chat the bot can see — it filters on the sender, never on the chat is complete.
